name: GitHub
description: Triage PRs, inspect issues, and publish changes from agent sessions.
keywords: Enable the GitHub plugin or authenticate gh where agents run.
Agents can inspect repositories, issues, pull requests, and checks.

access.label: Host connector
access.detail: Available to host agents that have the GitHub connector or gh authentication. Local terminal agents need their own GitHub auth.

steps.title: Connect GitHub
steps.detail: Enable the GitHub plugin or authenticate gh where agents run.

steps.title: Start a session
steps.detail: Agents can inspect repositories, issues, pull requests, and checks.
